name: io.github.NORTHTEKDevs/ghost
description: Computer-use MCP server for Windows. Drives any native app (Win32/WPF/UWP/Electron), including apps with no API, in the background without stealing focus or the cursor, and verifies every action. Model-agnostic vision grounding.

environmentVariables.name: GHOST_VISION_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional. API key for OpenAI-compatible vision grounding (or OPENAI_API_KEY / NVIDIA_API_KEY / ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). Local tiers (cache/UIA/OCR/CV) work with no key.

environmentVariables.name: GHOST_VISION_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Endpoint for a self-hosted / alternate OpenAI-compatible vision model (vLLM/Ollama/LM Studio/OpenAI/Gemini/Groq).
